title: Clinical Research Coordinator
description: Stanford Medicine is recruiting Clinical Research Coordinators to support groundbreaking clinical trials advancing patient care. Based in Palo Alto, you'll oversee study logistics, ensure regulatory compliance, and work directly with research teams and patients. This role combines meticulous attention to detail with the satisfaction of contributing to medical discoveries that improve human health. You'll work with world-class researchers and cutting-edge medical science.
responsibilities: Recruit, screen, and enroll eligible patients into clinical trials, ensuring informed consent and participant safety
Collect and manage study data, conducting quality checks and maintaining regulatory documentation
Maintain regulatory compliance with IRB and FDA requirements; prepare and update study documentation
Coordinate study visits, manage patient communication, and track appointments and follow-ups
Collaborate with physicians, nurses, and research teams to execute study protocols and resolve issues

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Healthcare, Business, or related field
